narrative: An Applied ML Engineer at upGrad, a product-first company, with 5 years of experience, this candidate ranked #82 due to their strong verified skill depth. Their background aligns with the JD's requirements, particularly in NLP and BM25. However, their location in Hyderabad, outside of the preferred Pune/Noida areas, and minor concerns with their profile credibility, impacted their overall ranking. Despite a good experience level alignment and relevant skill set, these limitations contributed to their lower ranking among the candidate pool.
